testcase.name: test_paint_forecast_returns_200
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_dashboard_paint_ai.py:109: in test_paint_forecast_returns_200 assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 500: {"detail":"AI servisi hatası: Failed to generate chat completion: litellm.InternalServerError: InternalServerError: OpenAIException - litellm.InternalServerError: InternalServerError: OpenAIException - Connection error.. Received Model Group=gpt-5.2\nAvailable Model Group Fallbacks=None"} E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_dashboard_paint_ai.py:115: in test_paint_forecast_has_forecast_text assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
